ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "BAD_REQUEST", message: "Invalid request format or parameters", timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "NOT_FOUND", message: "Resource not found", timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED", message: "Method not allowed for this resource", timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }

logger.doc:name: Log Request
logger.message: Retrieving accounts - Correlation ID: #[correlationId], Query Params: #[attributes.queryParams]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java var baseQuery = "SELECT Id, Name, AccountNumber, Type, Industry, BillingStreet, BillingCity, BillingState, BillingPostalCode, BillingCountry, ShippingStreet, ShippingCity, ShippingState, ShippingPostalCode, ShippingCountry, Phone, Website, OwnerId, CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate FROM Account" var whereConditions = [] var typeCondition = if (!isEmpty(vars.typeFilter)) ["Type = '" ++ vars.typeFilter ++ "'"] else [] var industryCondition = if (!isEmpty(vars.industryFilter)) ["Industry = '" ++ vars.industryFilter ++ "'"] else [] var allConditions = typeCondition ++ industryCondition var whereClause = if (!isEmpty(allConditions)) " WHERE " ++ (allConditions joinBy " AND ") else "" var limitClause = " LIMIT " ++ vars.limit as String var offsetClause = " OFFSET " ++ vars.offset as String --- baseQuery ++ whereClause ++ limitClause ++ offsetClause

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map { Id: $.Id, Name: $.Name, AccountNumber: $.AccountNumber, Type: $.Type, Industry: $.Industry, BillingAddress: { street: $.BillingStreet, city: $.BillingCity, state: $.BillingState, postalCode: $.BillingPostalCode, country: $.BillingCountry } unless ($.BillingStreet == null and $.BillingCity == null and $.BillingState == null and $.BillingPostalCode == null and $.BillingCountry == null), ShippingAddress: { street: $.ShippingStreet, city: $.ShippingCity, state: $.ShippingState, postalCode: $.ShippingPostalCode, country: $.ShippingCountry } unless ($.ShippingStreet == null and $.ShippingCity == null and $.ShippingState == null and $.ShippingPostalCode == null and $.ShippingCountry == null), Phone: $.Phone, Website: $.Website, OwnerId: $.OwnerId, CreatedDate: $.CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate: $.LastModifiedDate }

logger.doc:name: Log Request
logger.message: Retrieving account by ID: #[attributes.uriParams.id] - Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Account by ID
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, AccountNumber, Type, Industry, BillingStreet, BillingCity, BillingState, BillingPostalCode, BillingCountry, ShippingStreet, ShippingCity, ShippingState, ShippingPostalCode, ShippingCountry, Phone, Website, OwnerId, CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate FROM Account WHERE Id = '#[attributes.uriParams.id]'

logger.doc:name: Log Not Found
logger.message: Account not found with ID: #[attributes.uriParams.id] - Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND", message: "Account not found with ID: " ++ attributes.uriParams.id, timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { Id: payload[0].Id, Name: payload[0].Name, AccountNumber: payload[0].AccountNumber, Type: payload[0].Type, Industry: payload[0].Industry, BillingAddress: { street: payload[0].BillingStreet, city: payload[0].BillingCity, state: payload[0].BillingState, postalCode: payload[0].BillingPostalCode, country: payload[0].BillingCountry } unless (payload[0].BillingStreet == null and payload[0].BillingCity == null and payload[0].BillingState == null and payload[0].BillingPostalCode == null and payload[0].BillingCountry == null), ShippingAddress: { street: payload[0].ShippingStreet, city: payload[0].ShippingCity, state: payload[0].ShippingState, postalCode: payload[0].ShippingPostalCode, country: payload[0].ShippingCountry } unless (payload[0].ShippingStreet == null and payload[0].ShippingCity == null and payload[0].ShippingState == null and payload[0].ShippingPostalCode == null and payload[0].ShippingCountry == null), Phone: payload[0].Phone, Website: payload[0].Website, OwnerId: payload[0].OwnerId, CreatedDate: payload[0].CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate: payload[0].LastModifiedDate }

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { Name: payload.Name, AccountNumber: payload.AccountNumber, Type: payload.Type, Industry: payload.Industry, BillingStreet: payload.BillingAddress.street, BillingCity: payload.BillingAddress.city, BillingState: payload.BillingAddress.state, BillingPostalCode: payload.BillingAddress.postalCode, BillingCountry: payload.BillingAddress.country, ShippingStreet: payload.ShippingAddress.street, ShippingCity: payload.ShippingAddress.city, ShippingState: payload.ShippingAddress.state, ShippingPostalCode: payload.ShippingAddress.postalCode, ShippingCountry: payload.ShippingAddress.country, Phone: payload.Phone, Website: payload.Website } filterObject (value, key) -> value != null

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Created Account
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, AccountNumber, Type, Industry, BillingStreet, BillingCity, BillingState, BillingPostalCode, BillingCountry, ShippingStreet, ShippingCity, ShippingState, ShippingPostalCode, ShippingCountry, Phone, Website, OwnerId, CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate FROM Account WHERE Id = '#[vars.accountId]'

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { Id: payload[0].Id, Name: payload[0].Name, AccountNumber: payload[0].AccountNumber, Type: payload[0].Type, Industry: payload[0].Industry, BillingAddress: { street: payload[0].BillingStreet, city: payload[0].BillingCity, state: payload[0].BillingState, postalCode: payload[0].BillingPostalCode, country: payload[0].BillingCountry } unless (payload[0].BillingStreet == null and payload[0].BillingCity == null and payload[0].BillingState == null and payload[0].BillingPostalCode == null and payload[0].BillingCountry == null), ShippingAddress: { street: payload[0].ShippingStreet, city: payload[0].ShippingCity, state: payload[0].ShippingState, postalCode: payload[0].ShippingPostalCode, country: payload[0].ShippingCountry } unless (payload[0].ShippingStreet == null and payload[0].ShippingCity == null and payload[0].ShippingState == null and payload[0].ShippingPostalCode == null and payload[0].ShippingCountry == null), Phone: payload[0].Phone, Website: payload[0].Website, OwnerId: payload[0].OwnerId, CreatedDate: payload[0].CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate: payload[0].LastModifiedDate }

logger.doc:name: Log Success
logger.message: Successfully created account: #[payload.Name] with ID: #[payload.Id] - Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Creation Error
logger.message: Failed to create account: #[payload[0].errors[0].message] - Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "ACCOUNT_CREATION_FAILED", message: payload[0].errors[0].message, timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }

salesforce:query.doc:name: Check Account Exists
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id FROM Account WHERE Id = '#[attributes.uriParams.id]'

logger.doc:name: Log Not Found
logger.message: Account not found with ID: #[attributes.uriParams.id] - Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND", message: "Account not found with ID: " ++ attributes.uriParams.id, timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { Id: attributes.uriParams.id, Name: payload.Name, AccountNumber: payload.AccountNumber, Type: payload.Type, Industry: payload.Industry, BillingStreet: payload.BillingAddress.street, BillingCity: payload.BillingAddress.city, BillingState: payload.BillingAddress.state, BillingPostalCode: payload.BillingAddress.postalCode, BillingCountry: payload.BillingAddress.country, ShippingStreet: payload.ShippingAddress.street, ShippingCity: payload.ShippingAddress.city, ShippingState: payload.ShippingAddress.state, ShippingPostalCode: payload.ShippingAddress.postalCode, ShippingCountry: payload.ShippingAddress.country, Phone: payload.Phone, Website: payload.Website } filterObject (value, key) -> value != null

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Updated Account
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, AccountNumber, Type, Industry, BillingStreet, BillingCity, BillingState, BillingPostalCode, BillingCountry, ShippingStreet, ShippingCity, ShippingState, ShippingPostalCode, ShippingCountry, Phone, Website, OwnerId, CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate FROM Account WHERE Id = '#[attributes.uriParams.id]'

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { Id: payload[0].Id, Name: payload[0].Name, AccountNumber: payload[0].AccountNumber, Type: payload[0].Type, Industry: payload[0].Industry, BillingAddress: { street: payload[0].BillingStreet, city: payload[0].BillingCity, state: payload[0].BillingState, postalCode: payload[0].BillingPostalCode, country: payload[0].BillingCountry } unless (payload[0].BillingStreet == null and payload[0].BillingCity == null and payload[0].BillingState == null and payload[0].BillingPostalCode == null and payload[0].BillingCountry == null), ShippingAddress: { street: payload[0].ShippingStreet, city: payload[0].ShippingCity, state: payload[0].ShippingState, postalCode: payload[0].ShippingPostalCode, country: payload[0].ShippingCountry } unless (payload[0].ShippingStreet == null and payload[0].ShippingCity == null and payload[0].ShippingState == null and payload[0].ShippingPostalCode == null and payload[0].ShippingCountry == null), Phone: payload[0].Phone, Website: payload[0].Website, OwnerId: payload[0].OwnerId, CreatedDate: payload[0].CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate: payload[0].LastModifiedDate }

logger.doc:name: Log Success
logger.message: Successfully updated account: #[payload.Name] with ID: #[payload.Id] - Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Update Error
logger.message: Failed to update account: #[payload[0].errors[0].message] - Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "ACCOUNT_UPDATE_FAILED", message: payload[0].errors[0].message, timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "UP", timestamp: now(), salesforceConnection: "CONNECTED" }

logger.doc:name: Log Connection Error
logger.message: Salesforce connection failed during health check - Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "DOWN", timestamp: now(), salesforceConnection: "DISCONNECTED", error: error.description default "Unable to connect to Salesforce" }
